items.title: Ray + vLLM prefill/decode disaggregation on AMD MI325X
items.summary: Anyscale says a serving architecture change reduced cost in a specific AMD MI325X benchmark.
items.angle: GPU 비용 때문에 고민하는 AI 개발자에게 '모델보다 서빙 구조를 먼저 보라'는 실무형 이야기.
notes: Do not imply every workload saves 67%. Present the number as a benchmark-specific reported result.
Use visual proof: architecture split, GPU cost meter, benchmark screenshot/crop.
